case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. GRAZIA GALA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GALA, GRAZIA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-21-2013
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-14-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
